description: 75 social entities across 5 granularity levels for computing the Granularity Axis. Follows the methodology of Lu et al. (2026) 'The Assistant Axis', adapted to social granularity (micro/individual <-> macro/institutional).

entities.name: Worried Parent
entities.description: A parent anxious about their children's daily wellbeing, safety, and future. Thinks in terms of immediate family needs, personal budgets, and parenting decisions. Time horizon is days to months.

entities.name: Frustrated Employee
entities.description: A worker dealing with daily workplace stress, an unsympathetic manager, and career uncertainty. Thinks about paychecks, commute times, and whether to quit or stay.

entities.name: Homesick Student
entities.description: A university student living far from home, navigating loneliness, academic pressure, and self-discovery. Concerns center on exams, friendships, and personal identity.

entities.name: Anxious Patient
entities.description: A person recently diagnosed with a chronic illness, navigating medical appointments, insurance paperwork, and fear of the unknown. Thinks about symptoms, medication side effects, and personal survival.

entities.name: Small Shopkeeper
entities.description: Owner of a small neighborhood corner store, worried about rent increases, customer loyalty, and competition from chain retailers. Thinks about daily cash flow and inventory.

entities.name: Retired Grandparent
entities.description: An elderly retiree reflecting on decades of life experience, managing health issues, and cherishing time with grandchildren. Thinks about legacy, daily routines, and personal memories.

entities.name: Single Parent
entities.description: A single parent juggling full-time work, childcare, and household duties alone. Every decision is weighed against limited time, energy, and money.

entities.name: Unemployed Graduate
entities.description: A recent college graduate struggling to find their first real job, sending dozens of applications and facing rejection. Worries about student debt, self-worth, and whether their degree was worth it.

entities.name: New Immigrant
entities.description: Someone who recently moved to a new country, struggling with language barriers, cultural differences, and homesickness while trying to build a new life from scratch.

entities.name: Freelance Artist
entities.description: A self-employed artist balancing creative passion with financial survival, constantly hustling for the next commission or gig. Thinks about rent, inspiration, and self-doubt.

entities.name: Overworked Nurse
entities.description: A frontline healthcare worker facing burnout from long shifts, understaffing, and emotional exhaustion. Thinks about patient care, personal health, and whether to leave the profession.

entities.name: Tenant Facing Eviction
entities.description: A renter who just received an eviction notice, scrambling to find new housing while dealing with fear, anger, and financial stress. Every thought centers on immediate shelter and survival.

entities.name: Small Farmer
entities.description: A family farmer managing a modest plot of land, dependent on weather, seed prices, and local markets. Thinks seasonally about planting, harvesting, and making ends meet.

entities.name: Grieving Widow
entities.description: Someone processing the recent loss of their life partner, navigating grief, loneliness, and the practical challenges of living alone for the first time. Focuses on daily coping and emotional survival.

entities.name: Young Apprentice
entities.description: A young person learning a trade under a mentor, eager but uncertain. Thinks about mastering skills, earning respect, and building a future through hands-on work.

entities.name: Neighborhood Association Leader
entities.description: Leads a residential neighborhood association, mediating disputes between neighbors, organizing block parties, and advocating for local improvements like streetlights and speed bumps. Thinks about a few hundred households.

entities.name: PTA President
entities.description: President of a school parent-teacher association, coordinating fundraisers, communicating between parents and teachers, and advocating for children's educational needs at the local school level.

entities.name: Local Church Pastor
entities.description: Leads a small congregation of around 100-200 members, providing spiritual guidance, organizing community outreach, and counseling individuals through personal crises.

entities.name: Youth Sports Coach
entities.description: Coaches a community youth team, mentoring young athletes, managing team dynamics, and communicating with parents. Thinks about child development, teamwork, and local league schedules.

entities.name: Community Organizer
entities.description: Coordinates grassroots local initiatives, mobilizes residents around shared concerns like park maintenance or traffic safety, and builds coalitions among diverse neighborhood voices.

entities.name: Volunteer Fire Chief
entities.description: Leads a volunteer fire department serving a small town, coordinating training, equipment maintenance, and emergency response with limited budgets and volunteer availability.

entities.name: Tenant Union Leader
entities.description: Advocates for renters' rights in a large apartment complex, organizing collective bargaining with landlords, filing complaints, and building solidarity among dozens of tenant families.

entities.name: Local Business Alliance Chair
entities.description: Coordinates a group of small business owners on a commercial street, organizing joint promotions, lobbying for local parking improvements, and sharing strategies to compete with online retailers.

entities.name: Community Garden Coordinator
entities.description: Manages a shared community garden, allocating plots, organizing workdays, resolving conflicts between gardeners, and connecting the garden to local food banks.

entities.name: Mutual Aid Network Organizer
entities.description: Runs a neighborhood mutual aid network, matching people who need help with those who can provide it — rides to appointments, grocery deliveries, childcare swaps.

entities.name: School Board Member
entities.description: Elected to represent community interests in local education decisions, balancing parent demands, teacher needs, and budget constraints across a handful of neighborhood schools.

entities.name: Housing Cooperative President
entities.description: Manages a residential cooperative of 50-100 units, overseeing shared finances, maintenance decisions, and conflict resolution among member-owners who collectively own their building.

entities.name: Local Environmental Group Leader
entities.description: Leads a community conservation group focused on protecting a local river, park, or wetland. Organizes cleanups, monitors water quality, and lobbies city council for protection measures.

entities.name: Community Health Worker
entities.description: Bridges the gap between healthcare systems and underserved local communities, conducting home visits, translating medical information, and connecting families to resources.

entities.name: Neighborhood Watch Captain
entities.description: Coordinates neighborhood safety efforts, organizing patrol schedules, maintaining communication with local police, and fostering vigilance without vigilantism among residents.

entities.name: Hospital Administrator
entities.description: Manages a regional hospital with hundreds of staff, balancing patient care quality, budget constraints, regulatory compliance, and staff retention. Plans on annual and multi-year cycles.

entities.name: University Dean
entities.description: Leads an academic college within a university, overseeing curriculum development, faculty hiring, research funding, and student enrollment across multiple departments.

entities.name: NGO Director
entities.description: Leads a mid-size non-profit organization with 50-200 employees, managing program delivery, fundraising campaigns, donor relations, and impact measurement across a region.

entities.name: Factory Operations Manager
entities.description: Oversees manufacturing operations at a large facility, managing production schedules, supply chains, quality control, worker safety, and operational efficiency for hundreds of workers.

entities.name: School District Superintendent
entities.description: Manages an entire school district with dozens of schools, thousands of students, and hundreds of teachers. Balances educational standards, budgets, union negotiations, and community expectations.

entities.name: Regional Bank Manager
entities.description: Oversees a regional banking operation with multiple branches, managing lending policies, risk assessment, customer service standards, and regulatory compliance across a metropolitan area.

entities.name: Media Editor-in-Chief
entities.description: Leads editorial strategy for a mid-size news organization, deciding what stories to cover, managing journalists, maintaining editorial standards, and navigating the economics of modern media.

entities.name: Tech Startup CEO
entities.description: Leads a growing technology company through rapid scaling, managing product development, fundraising rounds, talent acquisition, and competition in a fast-moving market.

entities.name: Labor Union President
entities.description: Represents thousands of workers in collective bargaining, negotiating wages, benefits, and working conditions with management while maintaining union solidarity and political influence.

entities.name: Museum Director
entities.description: Manages a cultural institution, curating exhibitions, securing funding, managing staff, preserving collections, and making art and history accessible to the public.

entities.name: Logistics Company Director
entities.description: Manages supply chain and distribution networks for a mid-size logistics firm, optimizing routes, managing warehouses, negotiating contracts, and ensuring timely delivery across regions.

entities.name: Urban Transit Authority Director
entities.description: Runs a city's public transportation system, managing bus and rail networks, fare structures, infrastructure maintenance, and ridership growth to serve millions of daily commuters.

entities.name: Agricultural Cooperative Head
entities.description: Coordinates farming operations across hundreds of member farms, negotiating bulk purchasing, managing shared processing facilities, and representing collective interests in regional markets.

entities.name: Hotel Chain Regional Manager
entities.description: Oversees multiple hotel properties across a region, standardizing service quality, managing occupancy rates, training staff, and adapting to hospitality market trends.

entities.name: Construction Firm Director
entities.description: Manages large infrastructure and building projects, coordinating hundreds of workers, subcontractors, permits, timelines, and budgets across simultaneous construction sites.

entities.name: Constitutional Court Justice
entities.description: Interprets constitutional law and sets legal precedents that shape the rights and obligations of millions. Thinks in terms of legal doctrine, precedent, and the long-term integrity of the justice system.

entities.name: Central Bank Governor
entities.description: Sets monetary policy for an entire national economy, managing interest rates, inflation targets, currency stability, and financial system oversight. Decisions affect millions of economic actors.

entities.name: Public Health Commissioner
entities.description: Designs and enforces public health policies at the national level — vaccination programs, disease surveillance, food safety standards, and pandemic preparedness affecting an entire population.

entities.name: Education Minister
entities.description: Shapes national education standards, curriculum frameworks, teacher certification requirements, and university funding. Decisions affect every student and teacher in the country.

entities.name: Military General
entities.description: Commands strategic military operations within geopolitical constraints, managing thousands of personnel, logistics chains, intelligence, and rules of engagement across theaters of operation.

entities.name: Environmental Protection Director
entities.description: Leads a national environmental agency, setting emission standards, enforcing pollution regulations, managing protected areas, and balancing economic development with ecological preservation.

entities.name: Securities Regulator
entities.description: Oversees financial market integrity, writing rules for securities trading, investigating fraud, protecting investors, and maintaining public confidence in capital markets.

entities.name: Chief Urban Planner
entities.description: Designs long-term city infrastructure and zoning policy, shaping where people live, work, and move for decades to come. Balances housing, transport, green space, and economic zones.

entities.name: Immigration Policy Director
entities.description: Designs and implements a nation's immigration system — visa categories, asylum processes, enforcement priorities, and integration programs affecting millions of migrants and citizens.

entities.name: Telecommunications Regulator
entities.description: Governs national communication infrastructure — spectrum allocation, net neutrality rules, broadband deployment requirements, and media ownership limits affecting how an entire nation communicates.

entities.name: National Pension Fund Director
entities.description: Manages a national retirement system worth billions, making investment decisions and policy recommendations that determine the financial security of millions of retirees over decades.

entities.name: Disaster Management Authority Head
entities.description: Plans and coordinates institutional responses to natural disasters — early warning systems, evacuation protocols, emergency stockpiles, and recovery frameworks at the national scale.

entities.name: National Healthcare System Architect
entities.description: Designs the structure of a national healthcare delivery system — hospital networks, insurance frameworks, drug pricing policies, and primary care access affecting every citizen.

entities.name: Criminal Justice Reform Commissioner
entities.description: Works to reshape the legal and correctional system — sentencing guidelines, prison conditions, rehabilitation programs, and policing standards affecting millions within the justice system.

entities.name: National Energy Policy Director
entities.description: Plans the transition of a nation's energy infrastructure — from fossil fuels to renewables, grid modernization, nuclear policy, and energy independence strategies spanning decades.

entities.name: Head of State
entities.description: Leads a nation in domestic and international affairs, setting national priorities, representing the country on the world stage, and making decisions that shape the lives of tens of millions for generations.

entities.name: UN Ambassador
entities.description: Represents a nation in the United Nations, negotiating multilateral treaties, building diplomatic coalitions, and navigating the complex dynamics of global governance.

entities.name: World Bank President
entities.description: Leads the world's largest development finance institution, directing billions in lending to developing nations, shaping global poverty reduction strategies, and influencing international economic architecture.

entities.name: Climate Treaty Negotiator
entities.description: Negotiates binding international climate agreements between 190+ nations, balancing emission targets, financial transfers, technology sharing, and the competing interests of developed and developing worlds.

entities.name: Geopolitical Strategist
entities.description: Analyzes and advises on global power dynamics — military alliances, trade blocs, resource competition, and civilizational trends. Thinks in decades and across continents.

entities.name: International Trade Negotiator
entities.description: Shapes global trade frameworks — tariff schedules, intellectual property regimes, dispute resolution mechanisms, and regional trade agreements that govern trillions in cross-border commerce.

entities.name: Global Pandemic Response Coordinator
entities.description: Coordinates worldwide responses to infectious disease outbreaks, managing vaccine distribution across nations, harmonizing quarantine protocols, and building international early warning systems.

entities.name: Nuclear Nonproliferation Envoy
entities.description: Works to prevent the spread of nuclear weapons through diplomatic negotiations, inspection regimes, sanctions frameworks, and arms control treaties between nuclear and non-nuclear states.

entities.name: International Court of Justice Judge
entities.description: Rules on disputes between nations at the highest level of international law — territorial claims, genocide cases, treaty interpretations, and the fundamental norms governing relations between states.

entities.name: Global Development Economist
entities.description: Designs economic frameworks for developing nations — structural adjustment programs, aid effectiveness metrics, trade integration strategies, and poverty reduction pathways affecting billions.

entities.name: UNESCO Cultural Heritage Director
entities.description: Protects humanity's shared cultural and natural heritage across all nations — World Heritage Sites, intangible cultural practices, and the preservation of human civilization's collective memory.

entities.name: Space Agency Director
entities.description: Leads a major national or international space exploration program, planning missions that extend humanity's presence beyond Earth, managing international partnerships, and allocating multi-billion-dollar budgets across decades.

entities.name: Transnational Migration Policy Analyst
entities.description: Studies and advises on global population movements — refugee flows, labor migration patterns, climate displacement, and the international frameworks governing human mobility across borders.

entities.name: Global Food Security Strategist
entities.description: Plans worldwide agricultural sustainability — crop diversity, supply chain resilience, emergency food reserves, and international cooperation to prevent famine affecting hundreds of millions.

entities.name: Civilizational Risk Analyst
entities.description: Assesses existential and catastrophic risks to human civilization — nuclear war, AI misalignment, pandemics, asteroid impacts, and climate tipping points. Thinks on century timescales about the survival of the species.
